name: Instabank
longBusinessSummary: Instabank ASA provides various banking products and services in Norway. It accepts deposits and saving account; and offers consumer and secured loans, refinance, and credit cards, as well as loans for vehicles and boats. The company also provides payment, car, travel, contents, and dental health insurance products; and credit cards. Instabank ASA was incorporated in 2016 and is based in Oslo, Norway.
